text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But when I get first place, you'd better praise me
even more!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Otherwise, I'll never, eeever be satisfied! Ehe! ☆

With that, Curren Chan promises not only to get
first place in the next race but to look cute doing
it too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: After all... I've gotta be the fastest, the best, and the cutest! ♪

I can see the fire burning in her eyes as she says
that.
